burdenOfProof: Beyond Reasonable Doubt (95%+) — EXCEEDED for Tier A parties
executiveSummary: This submission details a complex, multi-year criminal enterprise constituting racketeering activity under POCA. The syndicate is responsible for over R10.2M in direct fraud and theft, with a total quantum exceeding R63M.

tierA.name: Rynette Farrar
tierA.proofOfForeknowledge: Instructed creation of fraudulent financials; executed identity fraud (SF10); filed false perjury complaint (SF15).

tierC.assessment: Acted on instruction from Rynette Farrar. Warrants referral to SAIPA for investigation.

requestForAction: Open a criminal docket for investigation into the Tier A conspirators.
Treat Tier C participants as witnesses and/or potentially deceived parties.
Investigate the perjury complaint filed by Rynette Farrar as a false criminal report.
Execute search and seizure warrants for all financial records and devices.
Refer the matter to the NPA Asset Forfeiture Unit (AFU).
